title: nassella viridula
intro: Nassella viridula, also known as green needle grass, is a type of perennial grass native to South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Nassella viridula can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
